## ClickSay

## Click any element and ClickSay instantly captures it

## Click any element and ClickSay instantly captures it

128 followers

Visit website

Chrome Extensions

•

Testing and QA software

Click any element on your page and ClickSay instantly captures its CSS selector, computed styles, HTML, screenshot, and React/Vue/Svelte component name. Add your fix with voice or text, and a structured prompt hits your clipboard. Paste into Claude Code, Cursor, or any AI tool - it nails the fix first try. No more "the button in the header with the rounded corners..." Sweep Mode lets you click 5 elements and fix them all in one prompt. Free to start. Code PRODUCTHUNT2026 = 3 months Pro free.

Shivakumar K Nayak

#### What's great [...] #### vs Alternatives

I chose WordRocket AI over other alternatives because it is built for serious content publishing, not just basic AI writing.

The combination of Bulk Generation, Blogging Automations, Brand Voices, and multi-site management makes it much easier to scale content in a structured way. Most other tools focus only on writing, but WordRocket focuses on workflow and publishing with high quality content.

I also like the flexibility of using different models through OpenRouter and Straico integrations.

On top of that, the support and transparency from the founder gives more confidence compared to many other AI tools.

Overall, it fits my long-term blogging and agency goals better than other solutions.

Framer

What do you think? … [...] Shivakumar K Nayak

#### What's great

Well I grabbed "Agency Plan recently" and for me WordRocket is fantastic because it combines quality content generation with a structured workflow for serious bloggers and agency users. The output quality is consistently strong, especially when combined with the right models through OpenRouter.

Features like bulk generation, blogging automations, brand voices, and sitemap control make scaling content much easier. Definitely It’s not just an AI writer, it’s built for publishing at scale.

I love tothe flexibility with integrations like OpenRouter and even Straico support, which gives more model options.

results.title: HushLink: Sell any digital content with one simple link. | Product Hunt
results.content:
7mo ago

### You were amazing! Some valuable lessons...

First of all, big thanks for all your feedback!

I appreciate the valuable time of each and everyone of you who contacted me, suggested features, congratulated and offered advice. This is my first launch on producthunt and i'm super grateful for the community.

We have gained over 200 users overnight, who helped us track bugs, flow issues and refine the UX as we speak.

HushLinkp/hushlinkDaniel Kazak•

6mo ago

### Accept Crypto Payments - Yes or No?

What's everyone's sentiment on that? I'd like to introduce a feature where creators can choose to receive payments in crypto.

HushLinkp/hushlinkDaniel Kazak•

2mo ago

### Crypto payments - testing phase

Hi Ya'll!

Daniel with a quick update here.

View all

Reviews [...] Report

Malhar Ujawane

Threads Bio

Threads Bio

Congrats on the launch, I love the idea! Is it available for all regions worldwide eg India? Also do I need to have a Stripe account for it?

Report

Daniel Kazak

HushLink

HushLink

Maker

@malhar\_ujawane Thanks Malhar! Payouts are currently available for supported countries, you can find the full list here:  
  
  
India is currently available in preview mode. What does it mean for you? That additional verifications might be needed with our payment processor Stripe. So yes, creating or connecting an existing Stripe account is necessary for the onboarding process.  
  
Once verified, you can sell to your audience anywhere. (not limited by supported countries restriction).

Report

Chaitanya Vaddi [...] Report

MultiDrive
